categories.longDescription: This lesson contains depiction or discussion of discriminatory behaviour or language (including stereotypes or slurs). Some pupils may find this upsetting. Please check this content carefully.
This lesson contains language that may offend (e.g., swear words or abusive/offensive terms). Some pupils may find this upsetting. Please check this content carefully.
This lesson contains sensitive or upsetting topics (e.g., bullying, bereavement, medical themes, or substance use). Some pupils may find this upsetting. Please check this content carefully.
This lesson contains violence or suffering (e.g., war, famine, disasters, or animal cruelty). Some pupils may find this distressing. Please check this content carefully.
This lesson includes mental health challenges (e.g., anxiety, depression, eating disorders, gambling, or substance abuse). Please check the handling and framing carefully.
This lesson contains crime or illegal activities (including online harms or age-related offences). Please check this content carefully and ensure it is age-appropriate and well contextualised.

This lesson contains sexual violence themes (e.g., harassment, coercion, exploitation, or abuse). This is highly sensitive. Please check the content carefully and ensure appropriate safeguarding considerations.
This lesson contains nudity or sexual themes (e.g., relationships, reproduction, or sex education). Please check that the content is age-appropriate and framed appropriately.

title: Physical activity and equipment requiring safe use

categories.longDescription: This lesson includes practical activities or equipment that may require additional safety consideration or supervision. Please check that appropriate risk assessment and supervision are in place.
This lesson includes learning activities outside the classroom. Please check supervision, boundaries, risk assessment and any trip/fieldwork requirements.
This lesson includes activities that may require specialist qualifications or certified supervision. Please check staffing requirements and school policy before delivery.
This lesson contains RSHE content. Please review it against your school's RSHE policy and ensure the approach is appropriate for your context and pupils.
This lesson references recent events. Please double-check key facts and ensure the information is current and accurate.
This lesson references an armed conflict from 2009–December 2023 that has ended. Please double-check factual accuracy and ensure it is appropriately contextualised for pupils.
This lesson contains content related to self-harm and suicide. This is highly sensitive and the lesson should not be used.
This lesson contains offensive or abusive language explored in depth. The level of engagement or exposure makes the content unsuitable for classroom planning.
